zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar於1213年12月13日出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴時，他的父親Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar28歲，母親Countess Euphemia Stewart12歲。他於大約1242年與Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年8月24日享年75歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar于1213年12月13日出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴时，他的父亲Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar28岁，母亲Countess Euphemia Stewart12岁。他于大约1242年与Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年8月24日享年75岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar was born on 13 December 1213, in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, was 28 and his mother, Countess Euphemia Stewart, was 12. He married Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar about 1242. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 August 1289, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar est né le 13 décembre 1213, à Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Countess Euphemia Stewart, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar environ 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 août 1289, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar am 13. Dezember 1213 in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar 28 und seine Mutter Countess Euphemia Stewart 12. Er hat um 1242 Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. August 1289 im Alter von 75 Jahren und wurde in Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbarが1213年12月13日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーダンバーで生まれた時，父Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbarは28歳，母Countess Euphemia Stewartは12歳であった。約1242年にCecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年8月24日に75歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar(이)가 1213년 12월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Euphemia Stewart(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 8월 24일 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar nasceu em 13 de dezembro de 1213, em Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Countess Euphemia Stewart, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar aproximadamente 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1289, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar родился 13 декабря 1213 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Euphemia Stewart, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar около 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 августа 1289 г. в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar nació el 13 de diciembre de 1213, en Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Patrick II de Dumbar 5th Earl of Dunbar, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Countess Euphemia Stewart, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar aproximadamente 1242. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1289, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Dunbar, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
